creator: claude.com

evidence.text: The team ran internal benchmarks using a battery of engineering tasks from real HubSpot work. Claude consistently required the least human intervention to reach finished solutions. Signoretti noted a particular improvement with Claude Sonnet 4.5: "I've seen Claude Sonnet 4.5 asking for four pieces of information at the same time, whereas Claude Sonnet 4 was more sequential in the way it asked for information," Signoretti said. "That allowed us to speed up the development process even further."

title: HubSpot Claude Platform (API) case study | Claude by Anthropic
